warps.notes: Passage connecting to B1F at coord (17,21). warp_event 7,5 WHIRL_ISLAND_B1F 9.
Passage connecting to NW entrance cave at coord (7,15). warp_event 3,13 WHIRL_ISLAND_NW 4.

tile_layout.notes: Schematic from warp coordinates in WhirlIslandCave.asm. 10x18 tiles. Simple two-passage junction: passage to B1F at (7,5), passage back to NW cave at (3,13). Acts as an intermediate connector — a player coming from the NW entrance can reach B1F through this cave instead of the direct NW staircase. No items, trainers, or NPCs. Actual block layout in maps/WhirlIslandCave.blk.

cave.notes: Standard 7-slot cave table, identical to the four entrance caves in species and level. Source: data/wild/johto_grass.asm def_grass_wildmons WHIRL_ISLAND_CAVE lines 929-955.

water.notes: No water encounter table defined for WHIRL_ISLAND_CAVE in johto_water.asm.

fishing.notes: Uses FISHGROUP_WHIRL_ISLANDS per maps.asm. No accessible fishing in this connector cave.

notes: An interior connector cave (listed as WHIRL_ISLAND_CAVE in map_constants.asm, map ID 69) that acts as a junction between the NW entrance cave and B1F. It is 5 blocks wide / 10 tiles, 9 blocks tall / 18 tiles — the same dimensions as NW and SE. Reached from NW cave via passage at (7,15) in NW / (3,13) in this map, and connects to B1F at warp 9 (B1F coord 17,21). No items, trainers, or NPCs. Wild encounter table matches the entrance caves at level 22-25. This map was not listed in the original task specification but exists as a distinct pokecrystal map and is part of the NW island's internal structure. Source: maps/WhirlIslandCave.asm, constants/map_constants.asm line 134, data/maps/maps.asm line 147, data/wild/johto_grass.asm lines 929-955.
